series_metadata.series_title: Federal Emergency Response Network (FERN) Laboratory Records
series_metadata.series_description: All laboratory records associated with Federal Emergency Response Network (FERN) FDA (Food and Drug Administration) and FERN FSIS(Food Safety and Inspection Service) cooperative agreement programs. This includes the grant, the cooperative agreement contract and the award. The Section Supervisor is the Record Retention Coordinator for the laboratory records and the Financial Associate is the Record Retention Coordinator for the grant, contract and award.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Cooperative Agreement has ended ( final expenditure report). ; Electronic: Cooperative Agreement has ended ( final expenditure report)
